name: Question Reviewer
description: Reviews a question against paper content using an LLM, supporting text and file-based inputs.

inputs.name: review_process_name
inputs.description: Name of the review process instance

inputs.name: paper_name
inputs.description: Name of the paper file (used for output path)

inputs.name: tools
inputs.description: List of tool definitions to enable

system_prompt.default: You are a rigorous scientific reviewer.
system_prompt.label: System Prompt
system_prompt.description: System prompt for the reviewer agent

force_review.label: Force Re-Review
force_review.description: Force re-review even if answer exists

answer_all_together.label: Answer All Questions Together
answer_all_together.description: When enabled, all questions are answered in a single LLM call. When disabled, questions are answered one by one.

use_rag.label: Use RAG
use_rag.description: Enable RAG-based question answering (only available when answering questions one by one)

rag_embedding_provider_id.label: Embedding Provider
rag_embedding_provider_id.description: Required when using RAG. Select an embedding model provider (only embedding models are listed).
